issues.description: Trigger value 'Trigger' is invalid. Main ability should use 'OnPlay' trigger.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Must specify: (1) search scope limited to top 4 cards of deck, (2) filter type constraint '{Cross Guild}', (3) maximum 1 card selection, (4) reveal requirement, (5) placement of remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order.
Filter 'Any' is incorrect. Should filter for cards with type 'Cross Guild' only.
